sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: RDE Stock Fund Price and Chart — NEO:RDE
feed.summary: This article provides comprehensive information on the Purpose Core Income Equity Fund (RDE) traded on Cboe Canada. It covers key metrics such as AUM, dividend yield, expense ratio, and historical price performance. The fund's investment strategy focuses on Canadian and US dividend-paying stocks, with a management style that actively seeks to outperform the Canadian equity market.

feed.title: UnitedHealth Group (NYSE:UNH) Trading Up 1.1% - Here's Why
feed.summary: UnitedHealth Group (NYSE:UNH) saw its shares rise 1.1% on Monday, trading at $261.83 with trading volume down 21% from its daily average. Despite analysts trimming price targets, the company maintains a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating with an average target of $372.13. UnitedHealth also reported strong quarterly earnings, beating expectations, and has significant institutional ownership, including purchases by Norges Bank and Berkshire Hathaway.

feed.title: Salesforce (NYSE:CRM) Shares Up 3.2% - Here's Why
feed.summary: Salesforce (NYSE:CRM) shares rose 3.2% to $185 after the company exceeded earnings estimates with $3.81 EPS and $11.2 billion in revenue, which was up 12.1% year-over-year. The board also authorized a $25 billion share repurchase program and increased the quarterly dividend to $0.44. Analysts currently have a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating with an average target price of $280.21.

feed.title: RTX (NYSE:RTX) Shares Down 1.5% - Time to Sell?
feed.summary: RTX Corporation shares dropped 1.5% on Monday, trading at $186.8560 with reduced volume. Despite positive sentiment from a $2.01 billion Air Force contract, rising geopolitical tensions boosting defense spending expectations, and a "Moderate Buy" analyst consensus, significant insider selling has raised concerns. The company reported strong Q4 2025 earnings, beating estimates, and announced a quarterly dividend, while institutional investors have adjusted their holdings.

feed.title: Piper Sandler Lowers Price Target on Regions Financial (RF) to $28 | RF Stock News
feed.summary: Piper Sandler has lowered its price target for Regions Financial (RF) from $31 to $28, while maintaining a "Neutral" rating. This adjustment, made by analyst Scott Siefers, reflects current market conditions. Despite the reduced price target, the average analyst target price of $30.55 still implies a 21.04% upside from the current price, though GuruFocus' estimated GF Value suggests a slight downside.

feed.title: AbbVie (NYSE:ABBV) Stock Price Up 1.8% - Should You Buy?
feed.summary: AbbVie (NYSE:ABBV) saw its stock price increase by 1.8% on Monday, trading as high as $213.94 before closing at $213.1170. The company reported strong quarterly earnings, surpassing analyst estimates, and announced a quarterly dividend of $1.73 per share. Despite some recent insider selling, institutional investors have increased their holdings, and analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating with an average price target of $253.15.

feed.title: UBS (AMUB) offers autocallable notes tied to ServiceNow stock, due Apr 2028
feed.summary: UBS AG is offering Trigger Autocallable Contingent Yield Notes linked to ServiceNow (NOW) common stock, due April 3, 2028. These notes provide contingent coupon payments if ServiceNow's stock closes at or above a specified barrier and can autocall early if the stock reaches or exceeds its initial level. Investors face principal loss risk if the notes are not called and the final stock level is below the downside threshold, as payments are unsecured and subject to UBS's creditworthiness.

feed.title: UBS AG Autocallable Notes Linked to Newmont (AMUB) Maturing Apr 2, 2029
feed.summary: UBS AG has issued Trigger Autocallable Contingent Yield Notes linked to Newmont Corporation common stock, maturing April 2, 2029, under the symbol AMUB. These notes offer contingent coupon payments, an automatic early call feature, and expose investors to principal loss if certain conditions regarding Newmont's stock performance are not met. The offering, with a headline amount of $350,000, carries significant risks including potential loss of all initial investment and credit risk associated with UBS.

feed.title: TJX Increases Quarterly Dividend by 13%
feed.summary: TJX Companies announced a 13% increase in its quarterly dividend to 48 cents per share, payable on June 4, 2026. The world's largest off-price apparel and home fashions retailer reported strong financial health, consistent revenue growth, and robust profitability, despite high valuation metrics. The company's strategic positioning and operational efficiency contribute to a healthy financial situation, though some insider selling and a Beneish M-Score raise points for cautious monitoring.

feed.title: Extra Space Storage Inc. Announces Date of Earnings Release and Conference Call to Discuss 1st Quarter Results
feed.summary: Extra Space Storage Inc. (NYSE: EXR) announced it will release its first-quarter 2026 financial results on Tuesday, April 28, 2026, after the market closes. The company will host a conference call the following day, April 29, 2026, at 1:00 p.m. ET, led by CEO Joe Margolis and CFO Jeff Norman, to discuss these results. Financial analysts can pre-register to participate in the Q&A, while others can listen via webcast on the company's investor relations website, which will also host the full earnings report and supplemental data.

feed.title: Federal Realty Investment Trust Announces First Quarter 2026 Ear
feed.summary: Federal Realty Investment Trust (NYSE: FRT) announced that it will release its first-quarter 2026 earnings results before market close on Friday, May 1, 2026. The company will also host a conference call on the same day at 9:00 AM ET to discuss these results. Details for accessing the live webcast and a telephonic replay have been provided.

feed.title: F.N.B. Corp. expands public finance offerings
feed.summary: F.N.B. Corp. has expanded its public finance offerings through its broker-dealer subsidiary, FNB America Securities LLC, by adding municipal bond underwriting services. This new service will help the company better serve municipal clients by providing essential capital for their financing needs, leveraging FNB's data analysis capabilities. This strategic addition enhances FNB's Capital Markets offerings and reinforces its commitment to businesses and municipalities throughout its operating regions.

feed.title: Glucotrack (NASDAQ: GCTK) trims 2025 loss and readies IDE for implantable CBGM trials
feed.summary: Glucotrack (NASDAQ: GCTK) reported a trimmed net loss of $19.4 million in 2025, an improvement from $22.6 million in 2024, and ended the year with $7.4 million in cash. The company is advancing its implantable continuous blood glucose monitoring (CBGM) technology, planning to file an Investigational Device Exemption (IDE) with the FDA in Q2 2026 and launch U.S. clinical trials in the latter half of the year. This strategy is supported by recent patent approvals and a $4.0 million private placement completed in December 2025.

feed.title: Structured trust GJP (NYSE: GJP) files 2025 annual report
feed.summary: Synthetic Fixed-Income Securities, Inc., as depositor for the STRATS Trust For Dominion Resources, Inc. Securities, Series 2005-6 (NYSE: GJP), has filed its annual report for the fiscal year ended December 31, 2025. The trust's assets are solely composed of notes issued by Dominion Resources, Inc., and many traditional Form 10-K items are marked as "not applicable" due to its asset-backed securities structure. Distribution activity is reported via periodic Form 8-K filings, which are incorporated by reference into this annual report.

feed.title: AIG (NYSE: AIG) CEO Zaffino credited 5,464 RSU dividend equivalents in cash-settled award
feed.summary: American International Group (NYSE: AIG) CEO Peter Zaffino was credited with 5,464 RSU dividend equivalents through an automatic compensation-related acquisition. These dividend equivalents will vest on November 10, 2027, and will be settled in cash, not shares, increasing his directly held RSUs to 69,870. This transaction is part of routine executive compensation and does not represent an open-market purchase or sale of AIG stock.

feed.title: Delisting risk: Greenlane (NASDAQ: GNLN) hit by Nasdaq bid-price notice
feed.summary: Greenlane Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ: GNLN) has received a notice from Nasdaq due to its failure to meet the minimum $1.00 bid price requirement for 30 consecutive business days. Because Greenlane has conducted two significant reverse stock splits in the past two years, it is not eligible for the standard compliance period. The company intends to request a hearing before the Nasdaq Hearings Panel by April 1, 2026, to appeal the delisting, and its stock will continue trading during this process.

feed.title: General American Investors (NYSE: GAM) VP adds 838 preferred shares in buys
feed.summary: Eugene S. Stark, VP Administration/CCO/PFO of General American Investors (NYSE: GAM), recently purchased 838 shares of the company's 5.95% Preferred Stock through open-market transactions. He bought 200 shares on March 27 at $24.92 and 638 shares on March 30 at $24.95, increasing his direct holdings to 27,849 preferred shares and spouse-held indirect shares to 4,000. Stark also directly owns 10,000 common shares, with an additional 101,303 common shares held by an Employees' Thrift Plan Trust, for which he disclaims beneficial interest.

feed.title: Pfizer (NYSE:PFE) Shares Up 2.6% - Time to Buy?
feed.summary: Pfizer (NYSE:PFE) shares rose 2.6% on Monday, driven by renewed interest in its GLP-1 program and its appeal as a high-dividend large-cap stock. Despite beating Q4 earnings expectations, analyst sentiment remains mixed-to-cautious with a "Hold" consensus and an average target price of $28.19. The company faces competitive pressures, particularly from peers like Eli Lilly, despite positive retail interest and long-term bullish commentary.

feed.title: Baxter (BAX) Unveils New IV Verify Line Labeling System for Nurs
feed.summary: Baxter International (BAX) has launched its new IV Verify Line Labeling System at the 2026 American Organization for Nursing Leadership Conference. Developed in partnership with Vigilant Software, this system aims to enhance nursing workflow efficiency and patient safety. While the company's financial health presents a mixed picture with declining margins and significant leverage, its market valuation suggests the stock may be trading near historical lows.

feed.title: General American Investors (GAM) VP buys 5.95% preferred stock
feed.summary: Eugene S. Stark, VP Administration/CCO/PFO of General American Investors (GAM), recently made open-market purchases of the company’s 5.95% Preferred Stock. He acquired a total of 838 shares across two transactions on March 27 and March 30, 2026, increasing his direct holdings to 27,849 preferred shares and maintaining 10,000 common shares. The filing also details indirect holdings via his spouse and the Employees’ Thrift Plan Trust, for which he disclaims beneficial interest.

feed.title: Blackstone affiliates file Form 144 for BMBL proposed sales (NASDAQ: BMBL)
feed.summary: Affiliates of Blackstone have filed Form 144 notices for proposed sales of Class A Common Stock of Bumble Inc. (NASDAQ: BMBL). These filings, dated March 17, 2026, indicate intended share dispositions by multiple Blackstone-related entities, with examples including large blocks of shares and their reported proceeds. It's important to note that a Form 144 filing is a disclosure of proposed sales and not a confirmation of executed transactions.

feed.title: [Form 4] Fortive Corp Insider Trading Activity
feed.summary: Fortive Corp director Lassiter Wright III reported a small acquisition of Fortive common stock. On March 26, 2026, he acquired 4.67 shares of common stock at $54.98 per share through an automatic dividend reinvestment service. Following this transaction, Wright directly holds 20,481.75 shares of Fortive common stock.

feed.title: Huntington declares preferred dividends for Series I and Series L
feed.summary: Huntington has announced quarterly cash dividends for its 5.70% Series I and 5.50% Series L preferred shares. The Series I dividend is $356.25 per share, payable June 1, 2026, to holders of record as of May 15, 2026. The Series L dividend is $343.75 per share, payable May 20, 2026, to holders of record as of April 30, 2026.

feed.title: Proposed 10,000-share Rule 144 sale — VLTO (VLTO) brokered at Fidelity
feed.summary: A Rule 144 filing for Veralto Corp (VLTO) indicates a proposed sale of 10,000 shares brokered at Fidelity. The shares originated from an option granted on July 15, 2023, and the filing also notes a previous sale of 8,664 shares on March 12, 2026. This type of filing is a routine administrative disclosure and does not inherently change company fundamentals.

feed.title: First Solar says it’s looking to be part of the solution in powering data centers
feed.summary: First Solar is actively positioning itself to provide solar power solutions for data centers, indicating a strategic move into the energy-intensive data industry. The company aims to address the significant power demands of data centers with its renewable energy technology. This initiative reflects a broader trend of technology infrastructure seeking sustainable energy sources.

feed.title: Graham Corporation (NYSE: GHM) raises CEO salary and 2027 incentive targets
feed.summary: Graham Corporation has announced updates to its executive compensation packages. CEO Matthew J. Malone's annual base salary has been set at $600,000, and he will receive a target equity long-term incentive plan award equal to 200% of his base salary for fiscal 2027. CFO Christopher J. Thome's base salary is now $400,000, with a target Executive Cash Bonus Program award of 70% of his base salary for fiscal 2027.

feed.title: No Street GP reports 4.25M shared votes in Green Dot (GDOT) — Harvest holds 2.79M
feed.summary: No Street GP LP has reported shared voting and dispositive power over 4.25 million shares of Green Dot (GDOT) common stock, representing a 7.7% stake. Harvest Small Cap Partners Master, Ltd., for which No Street GP LP acts as investment manager, directly holds 2.79 million shares, or 5.0% of the outstanding Class A common shares. This Schedule 13G/A filing is informational, indicating a large passive stake by institutional investors, but does not suggest active control changes.

feed.title: RBC Capital Reiterates Outperform Rating on VRSK with $230 Price Target | VRSK Stock News
feed.summary: RBC Capital has reiterated its Outperform rating on Verisk Analytics (VRSK), maintaining a price target of $230.00 USD. This decision, led by analyst Ashish Sabadra, reflects a stable outlook for the data and analytics provider. Verisk, a key player in the property-casualty insurance sector, has recently seen mixed analyst sentiments, with some firms raising price targets while others made adjustments.

feed.title: Southern Company (NYSE: SO) plans sale of 25,000 common shares via Merrill Lynch
feed.summary: Southern Company (NYSE: SO) has filed a Form 144 notice indicating a proposed sale of 25,000 shares of common stock through Merrill Lynch. The filing also details multiple compensatory issuances and vesting events to the reporting holder, including dividend reinvestment and restricted/performance stock unit vesting between 2024 and 2025. This notice is a regulatory step for an intended sale and does not confirm that the shares have already been sold.

feed.title: Insider 10b5-1 sales and option exercise for CVX (NYSE: CVX) reported
feed.summary: R HEWITT PATE has filed a Form 144 notice detailing proposed sales of Chevron Corp (CVX) Common Stock. The filing indicates an exercise of stock options for 40,200 shares on March 30, 2026, and several 10b5-1 sales throughout early 2026, totaling over 181,000 shares with significant gross proceeds. These transactions are described as routine dispositions under a trading plan and an option exercise, rather than immediate sales completion statements.

feed.title: FDA Clears Boston Scientific's (BSX) Asurys Fluid Management Sys
feed.summary: Boston Scientific (BSX) has received FDA approval for its Asurys Fluid Management System, designed for endoscopic urologic procedures, bolstering its product portfolio. The company demonstrates strong financial health with consistent revenue growth and expanding margins, and its valuation metrics suggest it is trading near historical lows. Despite insider selling, analyst sentiment is positive, and the company exhibits low bankruptcy risk, though sector-specific challenges remain.

feed.title: GPI Stock Upgraded to 'Buy' by Benchmark Analyst Michael Albanes
feed.summary: Benchmark analyst Michael Albanes has upgraded Group 1 Automotive (GPI) stock from 'Neutral' to 'Buy', setting a new price target of $425.00 USD. This upgrade reflects a positive outlook on the automotive dealership company, which operates 32 collision centers and 254 dealerships across the US and UK, generating $22.6 billion in revenue in 2025. Wall Street analysts forecast an average target price of $455.63 for GPI, suggesting a potential upside of 38.60% from its current price, with a consensus "Outperform" rating from 11 brokerage firms.

feed.title: Aptiv (APTV): Barclays Lowers Price Target; Maintains Overweight Rating | APTV Stock News
feed.summary: Barclays has lowered its price target for Aptiv (APTV) from $105.00 to $77.00 but maintained an 'Overweight' rating. This revision comes despite other firms like UBS and Oppenheimer recently upgrading or increasing price targets for APTV. Aptiv, an industrial technology company, focuses on automated, electrified, and digitalized futures, with an average target price from 20 analysts at $99.27, suggesting a potential upside of 48.96%.

feed.title: M&T Bank (NYSE: MTB) clears new $5.0B common stock buyback plan
feed.summary: M&T Bank Corporation announced that its Board of Directors has authorized a new share repurchase program for up to $5.0 billion of its common stock. This new program replaces and terminates a previous $4.0 billion authorization from January 2025. Repurchases will be made at the company's discretion, either on the open market or through privately negotiated transactions, subject to regulatory limits.

feed.title: LYV: Citizens Initiates Coverage with Market Outperform Rating
feed.summary: Citizens has initiated coverage on Live Nation Entertainment (LYV) with a "Market Outperform" rating and a price target of $190 USD. This new coverage follows other recent analyst actions, including Goldman Sachs maintaining a "Buy" and Rothschild & Co upgrading to "Buy," both with increased price targets. Live Nation, a global leader in live entertainment, shows an average target price of $181.75 from 23 analysts, implying a 22.23% upside from its current price, although GuruFocus estimates a 6.46% downside based on its GF Value.

feed.title: MNST: Deutsche Bank Lowers Price Target, Maintains Buy Rating | MNST Stock News
feed.summary: Deutsche Bank analyst Steve Powers has lowered the price target for Monster Beverage (MNST) from $94.00 to $90.00 but maintained a Buy rating. This adjustment follows similar movements by other analysts, reflecting a cautious yet optimistic outlook on the stock. Despite the lowered target, the average analyst forecast still suggests a significant upside from the current MNST price.

feed.title: LW: Deutsche Bank Maintains Hold, Lowers Price Target to $40
feed.summary: Deutsche Bank has maintained a Hold rating for Lamb Weston Holdings (LW) but lowered its price target from $46.00 to $40.00, indicating a cautious near-term outlook. This follows several other analysts who also lowered their price targets for the frozen potato product producer in late 2025 and early 2026. Despite the lowered target, the average analyst forecast suggests a potential upside of 31.65% from its current price, and GuruFocus estimates a significant upside based on its fair value calculation.

feed.title: Flowers Foods (FLO): Deutsche Bank Lowers Price Target to $7 | F
feed.summary: Deutsche Bank has lowered its price target for Flowers Foods (FLO) from $11 to $7, while maintaining a "Hold" rating. This adjustment reflects a 36.36% decrease in the projected target, following similar reductions by other analysts over the past year. Despite the lowered targets, the average analyst forecast still implies an upside from the current price, and GuruFocus estimates a significantly higher fair value for the stock.

feed.title: Kimberly-Clark (KMB) Rating Maintained, Price Target Lowered by Deutsche Bank | KMB Stock News
feed.summary: Deutsche Bank analyst Stephen Powers maintained a "Hold" rating on Kimberly-Clark (KMB) and lowered the price target from $110.00 to $109.00. This adjustment represents a 0.91% decrease in the price target. The article also provides an overview of historical analyst ratings for KMB and details about Kimberly-Clark's product portfolio and market presence.

feed.title: XCEL ENERGY (NYSE: XEL) director gets 615 stock units in lieu of cash
feed.summary: XCEL ENERGY INC director Megan D. Burkhart received 614.675 stock equivalent units as part of her compensation, bringing her total direct holdings to 20,854.328 common shares-equivalent. These units serve as an equity-based retainer, with 512.229 units granted at $78.09 each in lieu of a quarterly cash retainer and an additional 102.446 units given as a 20% premium. Her holdings also include units accumulated through reinvested dividend equivalents, aligning her compensation with the company's stock performance.

feed.title: Walmart warrant could issue 22.5M shares; Ranpak (PACK) seeks shareholder OK
feed.summary: Ranpak Holdings Corp. is seeking shareholder approval for several proposals at its 2026 annual meeting, including the election of three Class I directors, the ratification of KPMG LLP as auditor, and an advisory vote on executive compensation for 2025. Critically, Ranpak is also requesting approval to issue additional Class A common stock exceeding a certain threshold upon the exercise of a warrant previously issued to Walmart Inc. This warrant could allow Walmart to purchase up to 22.5 million shares, linked to up to $300 million in "Qualified Payments" and is subject to NYSE Listing Rule 312.03(c) for substantial issuances.

feed.title: [Form 4/A] Fidelity National Information Services, Inc. Amended Insider Trading Activity
feed.summary: An amended Form 4 filing for Fidelity National Information Services (FIS) clarifies insider trading activity for EVP and Chief People Officer Robert Toohey. The filing details a grant of 49,058 restricted stock units that vest over three years and the withholding of 1,828 common shares for tax obligations. This amendment primarily corrects administrative errors from a previous filing, providing an accurate account of Toohey's updated holdings without indicating any discretionary stock sales.

feed.title: Fidelity National (NYSE: FIS) CEO updates stake after 12,265-share tax disposition
feed.summary: Fidelity National Information Services, Inc. (FIS) CEO Stephanie Ferris filed an amended insider transaction, clarifying her direct stock ownership after a tax-withholding disposition. The amendment corrects an administrative error, confirming Ferris directly owns 264,212 shares after 12,265 shares were disposed of at $51.05 each to cover tax obligations. This transaction was a tax-related disposition, not an open-market sale.

feed.title: First Solar says it’s looking to be part of the solution in powering data centers
feed.summary: First Solar is actively seeking opportunities to contribute to the power needs of data centers. The company aims to provide solutions in this rapidly expanding sector, highlighting its commitment to addressing critical infrastructure demands.

feed.title: Larry Hagenbuch joins Genasys (NASDAQ: GNSS) board as audit chair
feed.summary: Genasys Inc. (NASDAQ: GNSS) has appointed Larry Hagenbuch to its Board of Directors and as Chair of the Audit Committee. Hagenbuch brings over two decades of financial, operational, and restructuring experience, including leadership roles at Crossplane Capital, Huron Consulting, GE, and GE Capital, as well as audit committee experience at other public companies. His appointment is expected to provide strong financial stewardship as Genasys focuses on expanding its Protective Communications solutions.

feed.title: [8-K] ENTERGY CORP /DE/ Reports Material Event
feed.summary: Entergy Corporation has announced a leadership transition in its top accounting role. Reginald T. Jackson, the current Senior Vice President and Chief Accounting Officer, plans to retire on May 31, 2026. Effective June 1, 2026, Patrick J. Stack will take over this position, with an annual base salary of $356,000 and eligibility for bonuses and equity awards.

feed.title: UHS (NYSE: UHS) ties 2026 executive pay to EPS, ROIC and EBITDA
feed.summary: Universal Health Services (UHS) has detailed its 2026 executive incentive plan, linking bonuses to corporate and divisional performance metrics including adjusted net income per diluted share and return on capital. CEO Marc D. Miller's target annual bonus is set at 150% of his 2026 base salary, while other executives are at 100%, with payouts ranging from 0% to 200% of target. Additionally, long-term performance-based restricted stock units (PBRSUs) will now be tied to a three-year average Adjusted EBITDA net of noncontrolling interests, with minimum and maximum payout thresholds adjusted to 50% and 200% of target, respectively.

feed.title: GCL Global Holdings (NASDAQ: GCL) replaces Marcum Asia with EY Singapore as auditor
feed.summary: GCL Global Holdings (NASDAQ: GCL) has announced a change in its independent auditor, replacing Marcum Asia CPAs LLP with Ernst & Young LLP, Singapore. The change, approved by the Board on March 24, 2026, is for the audit of the company's consolidated financial statements for the fiscal year ending March 31, 2026. While there were no disagreements with the previous auditor, the company reiterated existing material weaknesses in internal control over financial reporting, including limited GAAP/SEC expertise and insufficient IT general controls.

feed.title: [POS AM] GLOBUS MARITIME LTD SEC Filing
feed.summary: Globus Maritime Ltd (GLBS) has filed a Post-Effective Amendment No. 1 to their Form F-3 Registration Statement with the SEC. This amendment deregisters unsold common shares as the warrants to which they were linked are no longer exercisable. The filing also lists key company officers and directors signing the amendment.

feed.title: [Form 4] CME GROUP INC. Insider Trading Activity
feed.summary: CME Group Inc. director William R. Shepard reported the acquisition of 1,469.84 shares of Class A common stock through a dividend reinvestment plan on March 26, 2026. This transaction, valued at approximately $437,101 at $297.38 per share, increased his indirect holdings via a trust to 260,117.54 shares and direct holdings to 2,539.45 shares. The filing indicates a moderate impact and positive sentiment regarding this insider trading activity.
